case_title: RANDALL, JAMES G. VS PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC CO. ATTN:TAYLOR, MICHAEL J.

docket_entries.description: CERT. RECEIPT TO MICHAEL TAYLOR RETURNED SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,200.00 FILED BY RANDALL, JAMES G. AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC CO. ATTN:TAYLOR, MICHAEL J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC CO. ATTN:TAYLOR, MICHAEL J.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RANDALL, JAMES G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC CO. ATTN:TAYLOR, MICHAEL J. $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,220.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-25-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-07-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
